series_metadata.series_description: Official personnel file for Secretary of State employees. Including, but not limited to, letters of recommendation, medical records, disciplinary records, performance evaluations, acknowledgement forms, emergency contact sheets, position descriptions, weather essential employee forms, I-9 forms, FMLA forms and payroll deduction forms. Also includes copies of all documents required by DAS.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain seven (7) years after employee leaves employment. After ensuring that all required forms have been submitted to DAS per DAS instructions, then may destroy., Paper: Shred
